steps.prompt: Numbers have shapes too — let's write them! Find 0 — it's a full oval!
steps.feedback: 0! A round oval — zero things. Now find 1!
1! One straight line — one thing. Now find 2!
2! A curve and a slide across. Now find 3!
3! Two bumps facing right. Now find 4!
4! Down, across, then tall. 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 — you wrote them all!
